name: boswell-hooks
description: Boswell memory, retrieval, transcript, and completion-governance hooks for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Persistent memory and lifecycle governance for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Loads Boswell before the first response, retrieves relevant memories on substantive prompts, guards corrective writes, checkpoints compaction, verifies changed work, and spools transcripts durably.
defaultPrompt: Show the Boswell context loaded for this thread.
Check the active Boswell tasks for this project.
